name: axiom
description: Workflow-oriented Claude Code skills for modern iOS/Swift development — SwiftUI, Swift 6, Liquid Glass, Apple Intelligence, and more
author: Charles Wiltgen

skills.name: ax-onboard
skills.description: Axiom skill index and quick-start. Use at session start in iOS projects to discover available skills.

skills.name: ax-apple-docs
skills.description: Apple framework API lookup, Xcode-bundled LLM docs, Swift compiler diagnostics, WWDC session references, and Xcode MCP integration.

skills.name: ax-build
skills.description: Xcode build failures, compilation errors, dependency conflicts, simulator issues, environment-first diagnostics, Derived Data, SPM cache, TestFlight triage.

skills.name: ax-build-ref
skills.description: Reference — xcodebuild flags, build settings, SPM configuration, xcconfig syntax, build phase scripts, CI/CD pipeline patterns.

skills.name: ax-shipping
skills.description: App Store submission, rejection troubleshooting, metadata requirements, privacy manifests, code signing, export compliance, age ratings, CI/CD.

skills.name: ax-lldb
skills.description: Runtime debugging with LLDB — breakpoints, variable inspection, expression evaluation, memory commands, symbolic breakpoints, Python scripting, crash analysis.

skills.name: ax-swiftui
skills.description: SwiftUI views, layout, navigation, animations, gestures, architecture, state management, debugging view updates, performance, iOS 26 Liquid Glass, app composition.

skills.name: ax-swiftui-ref
skills.description: Reference — SwiftUI containers, layout types, navigation APIs, animation curves, search, iOS 26 features, complete modifier catalog.

skills.name: ax-uikit
skills.description: UIKit integration with SwiftUI, UIViewRepresentable bridging, Auto Layout debugging, UIKit animations, constraint conflicts.

skills.name: ax-design
skills.description: Apple Human Interface Guidelines, Liquid Glass adoption, SF Symbols usage, typography, color systems, design patterns for iOS/iPadOS/watchOS.

skills.name: ax-design-ref
skills.description: Reference — HIG specifications, SF Symbols catalog, typography scales, color tokens, Liquid Glass API details, platform-specific design metrics.

skills.name: ax-swiftdata
skills.description: SwiftData @Model, queries, relationships, custom migrations, VersionedSchema, background contexts, performance, debugging migration failures.

skills.name: ax-core-data
skills.description: Core Data stack setup, NSManagedObject, fetch requests, schema migrations, thread confinement, N+1 queries, debugging crashes.

skills.name: ax-grdb
skills.description: GRDB/SQLite patterns, raw SQL, @Table models, SQLiteData/Point-Free integration, Realm migration, database migration strategies.

skills.name: ax-cloud-storage
skills.description: CloudKit sync, CKRecord operations, iCloud Drive file coordination, ubiquitous containers, conflict resolution, debugging sync failures.

skills.name: ax-file-storage
skills.description: File system storage locations, sandboxing, file protection, backup exclusions, Codable serialization, storage diagnostics, purge strategies.

skills.name: ax-concurrency
skills.description: Swift 6 strict concurrency — async/await, actors, @MainActor, Sendable, data races, @concurrent, Mutex/Atomic, ownership conventions, isolation patterns.

skills.name: ax-concurrency-ref
skills.description: Reference — concurrency profiling with Instruments, Time Profiler async workflows, actor contention analysis, thread sanitizer patterns.

skills.name: ax-performance
skills.description: Memory leak detection, retain cycle debugging, Instruments profiling, hang diagnostics, display performance, MetricKit, xctrace automation.

skills.name: ax-energy
skills.description: Battery drain diagnosis, energy anti-patterns (timers, polling, GPS, animations), thermal management, background energy budgets.

skills.name: ax-energy-ref
skills.description: Reference — Energy optimization APIs, thermal state monitoring, background refresh budgets, power metrics, Instruments energy templates.

skills.name: ax-swift-perf
skills.description: Swift language-level performance — COW, ARC overhead, generics specialization, collection efficiency, memory layout, inlining, whole-module optimization.

skills.name: ax-networking
skills.description: URLSession, Network.framework, NWConnection, structured concurrency networking, legacy API migration, connection diagnostics, TLS debugging.

skills.name: ax-networking-ref
skills.description: Reference — Network.framework API, NWConnection states, NWListener, NWBrowser, QUIC/WebSocket, TLS configuration, path monitoring.

skills.name: ax-storekit
skills.description: StoreKit 2 in-app purchases, subscriptions, transaction handling, receipt validation, restore purchases, StoreKit testing configuration.

skills.name: ax-app-intents
skills.description: App Intents for Siri/Shortcuts, @AssistantIntent, AppShortcutsProvider, parameterized intents, intent discovery, Spotlight integration.

skills.name: ax-widgets
skills.description: WidgetKit timeline providers, Live Activities, Dynamic Island, widget configuration, widget families, interactive widgets, StandBy mode.

skills.name: ax-media
skills.description: AVFoundation audio/video, Now Playing metadata, CarPlay integration, MusicKit, Core Haptics, PhotosPicker, photo library access.

skills.name: ax-background-tasks
skills.description: BGTaskScheduler, background refresh, processing tasks, background URLSession, debugging background execution, push-to-sync patterns.

skills.name: ax-core-location
skills.description: Core Location authorization, CLLocationManager, geofencing, significant location changes, beacon ranging, debugging location issues.

skills.name: ax-privacy
skills.description: Privacy manifests, required reason APIs, deep link debugging, Transferable protocol, localization, app discoverability, Spotlight indexing.

skills.name: ax-foundation-models
skills.description: Apple Foundation Models, @Generable structs, LanguageModelSession, Tool protocol, streaming, guardrails, on-device AI integration.

skills.name: ax-foundation-models-ref
skills.description: Reference — Foundation Models API, session lifecycle, @Generable constraints, Tool protocol details, availability checks, error handling.

skills.name: ax-coreml
skills.description: CoreML model deployment, PyTorch conversion, model compression (quantization/palettization), MLTensor, stateful models, SpeechAnalyzer.

skills.name: ax-vision
skills.description: Vision framework — image analysis, OCR, barcode scanning, pose detection, subject segmentation, DataScannerViewController, document scanning.

skills.name: ax-camera
skills.description: AVCaptureSession setup, camera preview, photo/video capture, interruption handling, threading, permission patterns, debugging capture issues.

skills.name: ax-metal
skills.description: Metal migration from OpenGL/DirectX, shader conversion (GLSL→MSL), Metal API patterns, render pipelines, compute shaders, debugging GPU.

skills.name: ax-3d-games
skills.description: SpriteKit, SceneKit, RealityKit game development — scene graphs, ECS architecture, physics, actions, game loops, SwiftUI integration.

skills.name: ax-testing
skills.description: Swift Testing, XCTest, UI testing, async test patterns, test architecture, recording UI tests, mocking, flaky test debugging.

skills.name: ax-simulator
skills.description: Simulator management, screenshot capture, push notification testing, location simulation, Axe automation tool reference.
